name: JTON
description: Token-efficient JSON superset with Zen Grid tabular encoding. First-author research paper evaluated across 22 models and 7 domains — reduces LLM token consumption by up to 60%.

name: Observer
description: LLM observability reverse proxy with sub-millisecond overhead. PII redaction, prompt injection defense, response caching, and token counting. Exports to OpenTelemetry and Prometheus.

name: AgentID
description: Zero-trust governance gateway for AI agents. Identity verification, policy-as-code (Rego), real-time kill switches, human-in-the-loop approval queues, and audit trails.

name: Incident-RAG
description: Agentic incident resolution system using a LangGraph state machine with hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + cross-encoder reranking) and confidence-based routing.
